chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-552 of 2020 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 29.03.2022 Petitioner present in person. Mr. Rafique Ahmed Dahri AAG Sindh. ----- It appears that the petitioner seeks a direct appointment for the post of Pump Operator on disabled / minority quota. Petitioner who is appearing in person is not able to demonstrate as to when such recruitment process has started and as to how many were contesting in minority or disabled quota. Outrightly, on the contention of the petitioner an appointment letter cannot be issued for him as Pump Operator since he has to contest on his own merit with either differently abled person or the quota that concerns with the minorities. Hence, we deem it appropriate to dispose of this petition with direction that as and when such recruitment process would be initiated which include the quota of differently abled and minorities, he may, subject to qualification, move an application for a contest amongst his competitors. With this observation petition stands disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
